hero.title: Recycle for a better future
hero.subtitle: Join our recycling platform and help protect the environment. Easy, fast and effective.

features.title: Why choose Recyclix?
features.subtitle: We make recycling easy, rewarding and fun for everyone

items.title: Easy recycling
items.desc: Find the nearest recycling points and learn what can be recycled with our interactive map.

items.title: Earn rewards
items.desc: Earn points and rewards for every recycling drop-off. Redeem your points for vouchers and discounts.

items.title: Join the community
items.desc: Share experiences, inspire others and participate in recycling challenges.

howItWorks.title: How does it work?
howItWorks.subtitle: Start recycling with Recyclix in just 3 easy steps

steps.title: Sign up
steps.desc: Create a free account in less than a minute and start tracking your recycling progress.

steps.title: Find a point
steps.desc: Use our interactive map to find the nearest recycling point to you.

steps.title: Earn points
steps.desc: Recycle materials and automatically earn points that you can redeem for rewards.

impact.title: Your impact matters
impact.subtitle: Together we can make a difference for the planet

quote.text: "Every small action matters. When we recycle together, we create a cleaner and more sustainable future for the next generations."

smartBins.title: containers & bins
smartBins.desc: Our smart bins combine automatic material recognition, connected IoT infrastructure and real-time data processing. They record every correct disposal precisely and transparently, turning the recycling process into an effective, measurable and motivating experience.

pricing.title: Choose your plan
pricing.subtitle: The perfect plan for your smart recycling

starter.name: Starter
features: Up to 100 kg recycling per month

pro.name: Pro
features: Up to 500 kg recycling per month

cta.title: Ready to make a change?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who are already making a difference. Start recycling today!

footer.tagline: The recycling platform that makes protecting the environment easy and rewarding.
